/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpid_tune_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libpid_tune_msg__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/pid_tune_msg__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/pid_tune/msg/_pid_tune_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hari-prasad-gajurel/Our_control/leg_control/build/pid_tune:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libpid_tune__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libpid_tune__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
